docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEAD, TANYA
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM(PLANTIFF)**GRANTED**
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.
(SC-109)AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR -DAN MCDOWELL TO APPEAR ON BEHALF OF AIRBNB FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.
REMARK: DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECD BY MAIL-SUBMITTED
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM(DEFDENDANT)**GRANTED**
EXHIBIT (PLAINTIFF - TANYA MEAD) FOR ZOOM HEARING - RECEIVED {HEARING: NOV-10-2022 AT 8:30AM}
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEAD, TANYA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-10-2022 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-10-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-10-2022 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG. PLAINTIFF TANYA MEAD IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM, REPRESENTED BY DAN MCDOWELL (LEGAL INVESTIGATIONS ASSOCIATE). PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT ORALLY STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,825.00 FILED BY MEAD, TANYA AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-19-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MEAD, TANYA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. $1,825.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,875.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-19-2022 - CONTINUED THE COURT'S OWN MOTION DUE TO THE UNAVAILABILITY OF A JUDICIAL OFFICER TO HEAR TODAY'S MATTER TO NOV-10-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF TANYA MEAD IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM, REPRESENTED BY DAN MCDOWELL. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. DEFENDANT WAIVES PROOF OF SERVICE. CONTINUED DATE AGREED BY ALL PARTIES. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.
